---
#title: "people"
listing:
  contents: people
  sort: "date desc"
  type: grid
  categories: true
  sort-ui: false
  filter-ui: false
  feed: 
    categories: [R, Quarto]
  fields: [image, title, description, subtitle]

page-layout: full
title-block-banner: false
# knitr:
#   opts_chunk: 
#     collapse: true
execute: 
  echo: false
---
 ![](images/favicon.png){.profile-pic fig-alt="logo, a simple graph resembling Edinburgh skyline" fig-align="center" width="33%"}
 
# [PEOPLE]{.second-color}
Here you will find useful information about the roles each one of the team members has.
